name: Clothing Cleaning
environment_block: bedroom with natural daylight through windows, dark sweater visibly covered in golden retriever pet hair, realistic bedroom clutter, warm neutral tones
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld selfie framing, natural hand movement, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic phone exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator slowly drags FurLift across sweater surface in one motion, visibly removing pet hair from fabric, pauses to show collected hair, shows clean sweater result
performance_block: surprised expression, natural smile, casual eye contact with camera, genuine disbelief at how well it works
platform_block: realistic TikTok UGC ad style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, fast social-media pacing
lighting_block: natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic bedroom lighting, slight smartphone overexposure near windows
motion_block: slow handheld motion, natural body shifting, realistic wrist movement while filming selfie-style, smooth but imperfect movement
audio_block: subtle bedroom ambience, fabric brushing sounds, quiet room tone, authentic creator speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no beauty-filter look, no luxury influencer aesthetic
